features: JUST ONE WIPE: Our extra-large, extra-thick wipes go further than any three generic wipes! UltraGrime is built tougher to handle heavy-duty cleaning, and clean an entire room with just one wipe. These wipes are packed with the power to kill 99.99% of bacteria and contaminants with a fresh citrus scent!

MULTI-PURPOSE CLEANING: Use these disposable wipes anywhere! UltraGrime Wipes are perfect for outdoors, offices, kitchens, bathrooms, floors, and more! Sanitising and disinfecting surfaces becomes a breeze with these heavy-duty cleaner cloths.

MORE EFFECTIVE: Our wipes stay wetter longer. Most wipes dry out within 5-10 minutes, while UltraGrime wipes remain wetter for longer! The wipes inside the package stay wet and usable even if the top is open for days.

ULTRA-ABSORBENT: Our unique absorbent design picks up dirt, grime, and contaminants and stays ready for more. Each wipe does more work and goes further than ever before. Start easy cleaning with UltraGrime’s bigger, wetter, stronger wipes.

PROFESSIONAL GRADE CLEANING: UltraGrime was designed to get more done faster than other wipes. Our skin-safe sanitiser formula protects your hands while breaking down even thick, caked-on messes. Use the bigger, better wipes; use UltraGrime
description: Product Description UltraGrime: Multi-Purpose Anti-Bacterial Cleaning Wipes - 80 Extra-Large Thick Wipes Don't push around grime, destroy it with UltraGrime cleaning wipes. Our special sanitizer formula uses kills 99.99% of bacteria the fast and easy way. Our wipes are bigger, wetter, and stronger than other wipes. You can clean an entire room with just 1 UltraGrime wipe! Multi-Surface, Multi-Use Our wipes aren't just bigger than other wipes, they pick up more mess. Our super absorbent sanitizing design takes your cleaning further than ever before! This formula is perfect for disinfecting homes, outdoors, bathrooms, kitchens, floors, offices, and more. Each wipe is 38cm x 25cm and much thicker than the average wipe. Out of the package, our wipes will stay wet for over an hour! An open package of wipes will stay wet for multiple days. Features: Extra Large 38 x 25cm Size Ultra-Absorbent Ultra-Tough Cloth Multi-Surface Action Industrial Grade Cleaning Stays Wetter Longer Flexible Recyclable Packaging Fresh Citrus Scent 80 Wipes UltraGrime brings professional-grade cleaning to your home. Stop scrubbing and scrapping at messes and start cleaning like you mean it! One wipe cleans it all with UltraGrime! Safety Warning Not recommended for the face and eye area.
